title: HexaJS Configuration Schema
description: Configuration schema for HexaJS Browser Extension Framework

$schema.description: Link to the HexaJS JSON schema

sourceRoot.description: The root directory for source code

assets.description: Static assets to copy to the build folder (globs supported)

tokens.description: Root-level DI tokens — overridden by environment and platform tokens

environments.description: Build environments (e.g. development, production, staging). Each can override compilerOptions, tsConfig, manifest, and tokens.

defaultMode.description: Default build mode when --mode flag is not provided

tokenItem.description: A DI token with a key, value, and optional context

key.description: Unique token identifier used with @Inject() and createToken()

value.description: Token value — any JSON type (string, number, boolean, null, object, array)

context.description: DI context where this token is available. If omitted, available in both contexts.

mode.description: How this UI surface is provided

sourceDir.description: Source directory for managed UI mode

indexFile.description: Entry HTML file inside distDir used by manifest

buildCommand.description: Optional command to build this surface before copying dist

viteConfig.description: Optional name to a Vite config file for this surface (only for managed mode)

icons.description: Icon source path (relative to project root). SVG is recommended; PNG is also supported.

outDir.description: Output directory for this specific browser

tsConfig.description: Optional tsconfig override for this platform

compilerOptions.description: Partial compiler option overrides for this environment

tsConfig.description: Override tsconfig file for this environment (e.g. tsconfig.prod.json)

manifest.description: Override manifest file for this environment

platforms.description: Per-platform overrides within this environment — same shape as root platforms
